MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Dismissal - No Appearance

Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Against Plaintiff, Mission Herbal Care, Inc. (Set No. One) Where No Verification Has Been Provided
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Jean A. Dalmore, Esq. of Murchison & Cummings LLP, Tel. 213.623.7400, Email: jdalmore@murchisonlaw.com for Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LIMITLESS INSURANCE SOLUTIONS, INC.'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Against Plaintiff, Mission Herbal Care, Inc. (Set No. One) Where No Verification Has Been Provided.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for Defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The matter is called. The Court notes that the matter was not contested.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Limitless Insurance Solutions, Inc., Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents Against Plaintiff, Mission Herbal Care, Inc. (Set No. One) Where No Verification Has Been Provided Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Counsel is Granted. Plaintiff shall provide verifications to the discovery at issue and responsive documents (if any) within two weeks of the date of notice of this order. Plaintiff shall pay $735 in sanctions to Defendant within three weeks of notice of this order.

Ms. Dalmore is prepare a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and is to email it to Judge Pro Peter Catalanotti at: Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com by the end of the day.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotii; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set No. One) Against Plaintiff, Mission Herbal Care, Inc.; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Counsel
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Jean A. Dalmore, Esq. of Murchison & Cummings LLP, Tel. 213.623.7400, Email: jdalmore@murchisonlaw.com for Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LIMITLESS INSURANCE SOLUTIONS, INC.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set No. One) Against Plaintiff, Mission Herbal Care, Inc.; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Counsel.

Defendant stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for Defendant (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The matter is called. The Court notes that the matter was not contested.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Defendant Limitless Insurance Solutions, Inc.'s, unopposed Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories (Set No. One) Against Plaintiff, Mission Herbal Care, Inc.; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff And Counsel is Granted. Plaintiff shall provide verifications to the discovery at issue within two weeks of the date of notice of this order. Plaintiff shall pay $735 in sanctions to Defendant within three weeks of notice of this order.

Ms. Dalmore is prepare a proposed order that repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and is to email it to Judge Pro Peter Catalanotti at: Peter.Catalanotti@wilsonelser.com by the end of the day.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotii; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
